-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("door")

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript
joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- #bWelcome to Exodus' Sparring Area -- #b -- #bSpar Commands: -- #b- "join spar" -- #b(Adds you to the spar queue) -- #b- "view queue" -- #b(Displays the spar queue) -- #b -- #b- "leave queue" -- #b(Removes you from the spar -- #bqueue) -- #b- "done" -- #b(Removes you from the spar, but -- #bonly if the spar has not started) -- #b- "start / stop" -- #b(Begins / ends the spar. Both -- #bsparrers are required to use) -- #b- "focus on / focus off" -- #b(Sets your focus to the center -- #bof the spar area" -- #b- "heal" -- #b(Heals your character, but only -- #bif you are not in an enabled spar) -- #b- "show / hide gui" -- #b(Removes display of the gui) -- #b[N/A] -- #b- "show / hide chat" -- #b(Removes display of player text) -- #b[N/A] -- #b- "show / hide nicknames" -- #b(Removes display of player nicks) -- #b[N/A] -- #b- "show / hide all" -- #b(Removes display of the names, -- #bgui, and chat) [N/A];
-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("door")
